remaining_schedule.reason: Group B #19 — 0W/12L, -2 pts. The easiest fixture of the season. After the Sinclair loss, WW must win BIG here to repair NRR. Target 150+, bowl them out under 60.
Group B #11 — 4W/7L, 19 pts. Another must-win; target a big-margin win for bonus point and NRR boost.
Group B #6 — 8W/3L, 38 pts. Strong side — a win here is a massive result. At minimum, keep it competitive.
Group B #1 — 11W/0L, 54 pts. Unbeaten all season. Compete hard; any win is a statement.
Group B #2 — 9W/2L, 43 pts. Second strongest — any win is a gift.
Group B #3 — 9W/1L/1NR, 44 pts. Very tough but even 4 pts is valuable going into the final stretch.
Group B #15 — 2W/8L/1NR, 11 pts. Easy 5 pts — bat big to maximise NRR for playoff seeding.
Group B #13 — 4W/7L, 17 pts. Season closer — finish strong with 5 pts and the best NRR going in.

qualification_model.points_per_win: 4 pts (standard win) or 5 pts (win by big margin — bonus point)
qualification_model.note: Loss to Sinclair Lions (WW 81/9, lost by 5 wickets) dropped WW from 4th to 5th — still 39 pts but NRR fell from +1.2518 to +0.9836. The cushion over 8th place (Brown Munde, 36 pts) shrank to just 3 points. With 8 games left, WW must win every beatable game. The 4 must-wins (Monroe Giants, Top Guns, Firehawks, EB Strikers) are critical — win them all with bonus points = +20 pts (total 59). NRR repair is urgent: the Sinclair loss cost us. Monroe Giants (07/25) is the immediate priority — WW must bat deep, score 150+, and bowl them out under 60 to reverse the NRR damage.

briefing: Waterfront Warriors are 5th in Group C with 39 points from 12 games (8W/4L), NRR +0.9836. The loss to Sinclair Lions — bowled out WW for 81 in 16 overs and chased down in 11.1 — cut the playoff cushion to just 3 points over 8th place (Brown Munde, 36 pts). The points system awards 4 pts for a standard win and 5 pts for a big-margin win (bonus point). With 8 games remaining — 4 must-wins, 4 upset/swing games — playoff qualification is still in WW's hands but there is no margin for error. The immediate priority: crush Monroe Giants Club on 07/25 to restore NRR and go back to winning ways.
